mapper.sql: (a.interviewee_name IS NULL OR a.interviewee_name <> '紧急手动登记')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO appointment (visitor_id, visitor_name, visitor_phone, visitor_id_card, interviewee_name, visit_reason, expected_start_time, expected_end_time, status, create_time) VALUES (#{visitorId}, #{visitorName}, #{visitorPhone}, #{visitorIdCard}, #{intervieweeName}, #{visitReason}, #{expectedStartTime}, #{expectedEndTime}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM appointment WHERE visitor_id = #{visitorId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM appointment WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM appointment WHERE status = #{status} AND visitor_id = #{visitorId}
SELECT * FROM appointment WHERE appointment_id = #{appointmentId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM access_log WHERE appointment_id = #{appointmentId} AND access_type = #{accessType}
mapper.update: UPDATE appointment SET status = #{status} WHERE appointment_id = #{appointmentId}
UPDATE appointment SET status = 6 WHERE status = 0 AND expected_end_time IS NOT NULL AND expected_end_time <= #{now}
UPDATE appointment SET qr_code_url = #{qrCodeUrl}, qr_expire_time = #{qrExpireTime} WHERE appointment_id = #{appointmentId}
UPDATE appointment SET approver_id = #{approverId}, status = 1, process_time = #{processTime} WHERE appointment_id = #{appointmentId}
UPDATE appointment SET approver_id = #{approverId}, status = 2, reject_reason = #{reason}, process_time = #{processTime} WHERE appointment_id = #{appointmentId}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM appointment WHERE appointment_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM appointment WHERE approver_id = #{approverId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE appointment SET approver_id = #{approverId} WHERE appointment_id = #{appointmentId}
UPDATE appointment SET process_time = #{processTime} WHERE appointment_id = #{appointmentId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM appointment WHERE status = 0 AND (approver_id IS NULL OR approver_id = #{approverId}) ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT * FROM appointment WHERE approver_id = #{approverId} AND status <> 0 AND (visitor_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR visitor_phone LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
AND create_time >= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND create_time <= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND process_time >= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND process_time <= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND status IN (1,3,4,5,6) AND status = 2
ORDER BY process_time DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM appointment WHERE status = 0 AND (approver_id IS NULL OR approver_id = #{adminId}) ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT a.* FROM appointment a WHERE a.status = 4 AND AND a.expected_end_time <= #{now} AND a.expected_end_time > #{graceStart} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM access_log l2 WHERE l2.appointment_id = a.appointment_id AND l2.access_type = 2 ) ORDER BY a.expected_end_time ASC

SELECT a.* FROM appointment a WHERE a.status IN (4, 6) AND AND a.expected_end_time <= #{graceDeadline} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM access_log l1 WHERE l1.appointment_id = a.appointment_id AND l1.access_type = 1 ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM access_log l2 WHERE l2.appointment_id = a.appointment_id AND l2.access_type = 2 ) ORDER BY a.expected_end_time ASC

SELECT a.* FROM appointment a WHERE a.interviewee_name = '紧急手动登记' AND a.status = 4 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM access_log l1 WHERE l1.appointment_id = a.appointment_id AND l1.access_type = 1 ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM access_log l2 WHERE l2.appointment_id = a.appointment_id AND l2.access_type = 2 ) ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM appointment a WHERE a.status IN (4, 6) AND (a.interviewee_name IS NULL OR a.interviewee_name <> '紧急手动登记') AND a.expected_end_time <= #{graceDeadline} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM access_log l1 WHERE l1.appointment_id = a.appointment_id AND l1.access_type = 1 ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM access_log l2 WHERE l2.appointment_id = a.appointment_id AND l2.access_type = 2 )

SELECT a.*, u.real_name AS approver_name, u.phone AS approver_phone FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.approver_id = u.user_id WHERE a.status <> 0 AND a.approver_id = #{adminId}
AND (a.visitor_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR a.visitor_phone LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
AND a.create_time >= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND a.create_time <= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND a.process_time >= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND a.process_time <= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND a.status = #{status} ORDER BY a.process_time DESC, a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.appointment_id, a.visitor_id, a.visitor_name, a.visitor_phone, a.visitor_id_card, a.interviewee_name, a.visit_reason, a.expected_start_time, a.expected_end_time, a.status, a.qr_code_url, a.qr_expire_time, a.reject_reason, a.create_time, a.process_time, a.approver_id, u.real_name AS approver_name, u.phone AS approver_phone FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.approver_id = u.user_id WHERE a.appointment_id = #{appointmentId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM appointment WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM appointment WHERE create_time >= CURDATE() AND create_time < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM appointment a WHERE a.create_time >= STR_TO_DATE(#{date}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND a.create_time < STR_TO_DATE(#{date}, '%Y-%m-%d') + INTERVAL 1 DAY AND ( a.status IN (1, 4, 5) OR (a.status = 6 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM access_log al WHERE al.appointment_id = a.appointment_id AND al.access_type = 1 )) )
